About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) is a government organization responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various posts in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

The UPSSSC aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates and to select the best candidates for various government posts.

About the Programme

The UPSSSC Teacher Cadre JTC recruitment exam is conducted to select eligible candidates for the post of Assistant Teacher (JTC Grade Teacher) in the state of Uttar Pradesh.

The programme aims to provide employment opportunities to eligible candidates and to improve the education system in the state.
